backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Studiora backend, wiring together access control, blob storage, premium status, user profiles, trial management, and related query/update endpoints for both authenticated and guest users.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (subscription hook, Google Play Billing simulation, PaywallScreen redesign, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a human-readable index of what every component, hook, and page does in the Studiora frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Studiora SPA, setting the page title and mounting the React app via a root div and the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for login, dashboard, setup, focus, progress, and settings; wraps the app in SubscriptionContext and shows ProfileSetupModal only for authenticated non-guest users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Stub component that renders nothing; ads have been removed from the product.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedFocusSet: Premium-gated settings panel for the focus timer that allows customizing work/break durations, selecting ambient sounds, and viewing session history.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedStatisti: Premium-gated statistics section showing completed/pending task counts, a weekly activity bar chart, and a completion-rate progress list for the last 3 days.
Premium-gated panel component that displays AI-generated study insights (suggestions, encouragements, warnings, feedback) with expandable card list, loading skeleton, and empty state.
frontend/src/components/AIInsightsSummar: Displays a summary card of up to 2 AI-generated study insights, with states for loading, non-premium (upsell), empty, and populated data using icons and color-coded insight types.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Setup, Focus, Progress, Settings) that highlights the active route and provides press-scale feedback.
frontend/src/components/CelebrationAnima: Full-screen canvas confetti burst overlay that auto-dismisses after ~2 seconds and calls an onComplete callback, shown when all tasks are completed.
Modal dialog that prompts unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity to enable cloud sync, with login and dismiss actions.
frontend/src/components/DailyMotivationC: Displays a deterministically selected daily motivational quote from a static list, cycling by day-of-year.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header (logo + theme toggle), scrollable main content area, and a bottom tab bar.
frontend/src/components/NextFocusSession: Displays a card suggesting the next Pomodoro focus session based on the user's incomplete tasks or active exam, with a button to navigate to the focus page.
frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.ts: Modal paywall screen listing premium features with monthly/yearly plan selection, purchase handling via subscription context, and a restore purchases option.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: Wrapper component that restricts access to premium features by showing an upgrade prompt (with optional blurred preview) and opening the PaywallScreen for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Dialog modal that prompts new (non-guest) users to enter their name and saves their profile via a mutation hook to complete onboarding.
frontend/src/components/QuickActions.tsx: Renders three quick-action buttons (Add Task, Start Focus, Progress) that navigate to their respective routes.
Shows dismissible alert banners for exams occurring within 3 days and pending tasks due today, derived from the provided exams list.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button component that triggers the share study plan hook and displays contextual icons/labels for idle, sharing, shared, copied, and error states.
frontend/src/components/SmartStudyInsigh: Card that displays up to three study insights computed from task completion stats, with AI-generated insights shown for premium users and a paywall prompt for others.
frontend/src/components/StudyCompanion.t: Renders a virtual plant companion that visually grows through stages (seed, sprout, seedling, young plant, blooming) using custom SVG illustrations, driven by the useStudyCompanion hook.
frontend/src/components/StudyTipCard.tsx: Displays a daily rotating study tip selected by day-of-year index from a hardcoded list of 15 tips, styled as a glass card with a lightbulb icon.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorSec: Renders a grid of color theme presets allowing users to select app themes, gating non-free themes behind a premium paywall check and showing a PaywallScreen when needed.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A simple icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.ts: Displays a premium upgrade prompt in either compact or full layout, listing premium feature highlights and opening a PaywallScreen modal on button click.
frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContex: Provides a React context for subscription state (premium status, plan, billing) using useSubscription, and automatically restores purchases from Google Play on mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity or actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIInsights.ts: Generates a prioritized list of AI-style study insights by applying rule-based logic over streak, daily progress, focus session history, and exam data.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientSound.ts: Provides a custom hook that creates AudioContext-based ambient sound generators (white noise, rain, cafe) using Web Audio API filters and looping buffers, returning a cleanup function to stop playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackupRestore.ts: Manages backup and restore operations for app data, handling loading states, success/error messages with auto-clear timers, and React Query cache invalidation after a successful restore.
frontend/src/hooks/useCelebrationTrigger: Tracks whether a celebration animation should be shown when daily progress reaches 100%, triggering at most once per day using localStorage to persist the shown date.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudSync.ts: Provides a simple cloud sync utility that returns whether data was synced or a sign-in prompt should be shown, based on whether the user is in guest mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomTheme.ts: Manages app color theme selection from a set of predefined OKLCH-based presets, persisting the active theme to localStorage and applying CSS custom properties to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useExamCountdown.ts: Calculates the number of days remaining until an exam date (stored in nanoseconds), returning flags for whether the exam is today or in the past.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusSessionHistor: Stores and retrieves a capped history of focus timer sessions (work/break) in localStorage, exposing functions to add new sessions and clear history.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestMode.ts: Manages guest mode state with a persistent device ID in localStorage, auto-activating guest mode by default and providing enter/exit callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestToAuthMigrati: Provides a callback to migrate a guest session to an authenticated session by clearing the guest mode flag, with a placeholder for future data merging.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalDailyProgress: Tracks daily study progress (completed vs. total count) in localStorage, automatically resetting counts when the date changes and exposing a percentage calculation.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalProfile.ts: Manages a user's display name in localStorage, providing a getter and a setter that trims whitespace before saving.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStreak.ts: Custom React hook that tracks a daily study streak in localStorage, automatically resetting it if more than one day is missed and providing an `incrementStreak` function to record activity for the current day.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaywallTrigger.ts: Custom hook that manages paywall visibility logic using localStorage, showing the paywall only after a task has been completed and the user has not yet dismissed it.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for exam CRUD and task management, supporting both authenticated (ICP actor) and guest (localStorage) modes, including a guest-side study plan generator that distributes topics across days with revision sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useShareStudyPlan.ts: Custom hook that builds a formatted text summary of the active exam's study plan and exposes a `shareStudyPlan` function that uses the Web Share API with a clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudyCompanion.ts: Custom hook that computes a virtual study companion's growth stage (0–5) and progress percentage based on the user's current streak and completed focus sessions, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Custom hook that manages subscription state (free/monthly/yearly) by integrating with a Google Play Billing utility, handling purchase flow, acknowledgment, and restore, with localStorage as the persistence layer.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages light/dark theme state, applying the appropriate class to the document root and persisting the preference to localStorage, with an initial fallback to the OS color scheme preference.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for an indigo-based design system in both light and dark modes, including a glass-card utility and a subtle background image overlay.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with React Query, Internet Identity auth provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing today's tasks, exam countdown, streak, daily progress, and motivational components; supports toggling task completion.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new exam study plan with subjects, topics, exam date, and daily hours; submits via useSubmitExamSetup and navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/FocusMode.tsx: Pomodoro-style focus timer page with configurable work/break durations, session history, and premium-gated ambient sound support.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page offering Internet Identity authentication or guest mode, with feature highlights and animated UI.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Progress tracking page displaying streak, completed tasks, daily progress bar, weekly entries, and advanced statistics/AI insights panels.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component that handles user profile editing, theme toggling, authentication (login/logout via Internet Identity), subscription management, and local backup/restore functionality.
frontend/src/types/features.ts: Defines the `PremiumFeature` union type, `FeatureConfig` interface, and a `FEATURE_CONFIG` record mapping each premium feature to its display name, description, and icon.
frontend/src/utils/backup.ts: Provides local file-based backup and restore utilities that serialize specified localStorage keys into a JSON file and restore them from a user-selected file, with no server involvement.
frontend/src/utils/googlePlayBilling.ts: Simulated Google Play Billing integration that mirrors the real SDK's API using localStorage for purchase persistence, supporting init, launch billing flow, acknowledge, query, and clear operations.
frontend/src/utils/premiumCheck.ts: Exports `useConsolidatedPremiumStatus`, a hook that reads premium status and current plan from `SubscriptionContext` and returns them alongside legacy compatibility fields.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall Studiora project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a detailed registry of all existing implemented features with their requirements and versions. Serves as the source of truth for build planning and feature tracking.
